zh.lifeSummary: Richilde Von Schwaben於0990年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 康斯坦額寧根。她於1001年之前與Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1030年在德國海藍-普法爾茲享年40歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 雷根斯包格。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Schwaben
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Erwin, Ewald, Wolfgang, Erna, Gottfried, Heinz, Kurt, Manfred, Urs, Ute, Wilfried.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Schwab  .

variants.name: Schwab
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Swabia (German Schwaben), from Middle High German Swāp, German Schwabe ‘Swabian’. The region takes its name from an ancient Germanic tribe recorded from the 1st century BC in the Latin form Suebi or Suevi, of uncertain origin; it was an independent duchy from the 10th century until 1313, when the territory was broken up. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, and some other European countries (compare 2 below).
Germanized form of Czech, Slovak, Rusyn (from Slovakia), Slovenian, and Croatian Šváb or Švab (see Svab ).

variants.name: Swaby
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): habitational name from Swaby (Lincolnshire). The placename may derive from the Old Norse personal name Sváfi + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

en.lifeSummary: Richilde Von Schwaben was born in 0990, in Öhningen, Landkreis Konstanz, Baden-Württemberg, Germany. She married Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden before 1001, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1030, in Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 40, and was buried in Regensburg, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Richilde Von Schwaben est née en 0990, à Öhningen, Landkreis Konstanz, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne. Elle a épousé Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden avant 1001, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1030, à Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Landkreis Regensburg, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Richilde Von Schwaben wurde 0990 in Öhningen, Landkreis Konstanz, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren. Sie hat vor 1001 in Europa Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1030 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland und wurde in Landkreis Regensburg, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

Lei sposato Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden prima del 1001, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Richilde Von Schwaben(은)는 0990년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 콘스탠츠 oh닝에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1001년 이전 우럽에서 Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1030년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 레겐스버그에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Richilde Von Schwaben родилась в 0990 г. в местности oхнинген, ландкрис констанз, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden перед 1001 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1030 г. в местности раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности ландкрис редженсбург, беиирн, Германия.
